title: Junior Agronomist Intern – Agrivoltaic Projects
description:
R0001535 Junior Agronomist Intern – Agrivoltaic Projects (Open)
*We’re Nadara. We work harmoniously with the power of nature and the communities around us to power lifetimes to come. We call our approach ‘living energy’.*

*We don’t just produce renewable energy, we live it – recognising our relationship with the people touched by our business and supporting social, educational, cultural, and environmental initiatives that contribute to the development of the communities we work alongside.*

*Discover more about our business here:* *https://nadara.com/about/*

*Nadara is an innovative place to work. We work in a stimulating and challenging environment, where every day we explore the unknown with curiosity, make decisions with quality and take action and deliver with courage. For us diversity is a real value, and we encourage in connecting different perspectives with respect.*

*Discover more about our culture and approach here:* *https://nadara.com/living\-the\-company/*

**Job Description Summary:**
----------------------------

The Agronomy Intern will support the agronomy function across the full lifecycle of agrivoltaic projects (development, permitting, construction and operation), ensuring technical quality, regulatory compliance and continuity of agricultural activities within Nadara’s assets.
**Job Description:**
--------------------

**Key Responsibilities**

**1\. Project Development \& Permitting**

* Support agronomic design for new agrivoltaic projects
* Review and validate agronomic documentation within authorization processes (PAS, PAUR , VDO )
* Interface with external consultants (agronomists, environmental specialists, engineers)
* Contribute to mitigation measures design (e.g. renaturalizaton zones, vegetation plans)
**2\. Technical Documentation Oversight**

* Supervise agronomic deliverables prepared by third parties
* Ensure alignment with regulatory requirements and project standards
* Support preparation and consolidation of technical documentation
**3\. Construction Phase Support**

* Provide agronomic input during construction
* Identify and propose improvements to enhance agricultural integration
* Perform periodic site inspections to monitor implementation
**4\. Operations \& Agricultural Compliance**

* Monitor compliance with authorized cropping systems
* Track and document agricultural continuity requirements
* Organize and manage operational data for reporting and audits
* Support relationships with farmers and local stakeholders
**5\. Contractual Support**

* Assist in negotiations with farmers and suppliers
* Contribute to agronomic aspects of contrac ts
**Candidate Profile**

**Education**

* Master’s degree in Agriculture , Agronomy or related fields
* Preferred specialization: Crop Production and Protection or Agricultural Sciences
**Technical Skills**

* Basic knowledge of Agricultural mechanization, Crop defence, Irrigation systems
* Experience or interest in sheep farming
* Basic knowledge of AutoCAD and GIS software
* Ability to read and interpret technical and regulatory documentation
* Interest in renewable energy and agrivoltaics
**Languages**

* Italian: Fluent
* English: **Good working** **proficiency** **(B2 or higher)**
**Soft Skills**

* Strong problem\-solving attitude
* Ability to work in multidisciplinary teams
* Organizational and analytical skills
* Practical and solution\-oriented mindset
* Adaptability to complex processes
**What We Offer**

* Exposure to full lifecycle agrivoltaic projects
* Structured on\-the\-job training
* Dynamic and international working environment
* Career growth in a fast\-expanding sector
* Full time internship of 6 months, with a compensation of 800 euros per month \+ meal vouchers and hybrid working model
**Location:**

Milano \- Martesana
**Time Type:**

Full time
**Worker Subtype:**

Intern (Fixed Term)

title: Senior Expert Strategic Sourcing Italy MEP
description:
Location: Agrate Brianza, Italy
Category: Procurement
Job ID: 23493
Permanent
Exyte Italy S.r.l. (1006\)
  
**Discover your exciting role**
-------------------------------


As a Senior Expert Strategic Sourcing (MEP), you play a key role in strengthening Exyte’s regional supply chain capabilities across Italy. You will develop and implement sourcing strategies for Mechanical, Electrical and Process (MEP) equipment, work packages, and installation scopes—ensuring competitive commercial outcomes and reliable project execution.
  

Acting at the interface of engineering, construction, procurement, and project management, you contribute to building a resilient supplier base and advancing Exyte’s delivery excellence.


**Explore your tasks and responsibilities**
-------------------------------------------


* Develop and execute regional MEP sourcing strategies (e.g. HVAC, piping, electrical, instrumentation, installation services) aligned with global category management
* Establish and negotiate Master Framework Agreements (MFAs) with key suppliers and subcontractors
* Build and manage a high\-performing regional supplier base, including OEMs and installation partners
* Drive sourcing initiatives to improve Total Cost of Ownership (TCO), lead times, and project execution reliability
* Lead Supplier Relationship Management (SRM), including performance reviews and risk escalation
* Support project teams with preferred supplier lists, cost inputs, and sourcing strategies during proposals and execution
* Identify opportunities to optimize sourcing models (e.g. direct procurement vs. subcontracting)
* Ensure compliance with procurement policies, safety (EHS), quality and regulatory requirements
* Provide regional market intelligence (pricing, capacity, lead times) and contribute to global category strategies
* Collaborate cross\-functionally with Engineering, Construction, Procurement, and Project Management teams
**Show your expertise**
-----------------------


* 7–10\+ years of experience in strategic sourcing / procurement within MEP, EPC, life sciences, semiconductor, data centers, or similar industries
* Strong track record in developing sourcing strategies, negotiating commercial agreements, and delivering measurable value
* Solid understanding of MEP equipment, installation methods, and construction project environments
* Experience managing suppliers and subcontractors, including performance and risk management
* Strong analytical skills (cost modelling, benchmarking, supplier evaluation)
* Ability to collaborate across functions and influence stakeholders
* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Supply Chain, Construction Management, or Business; certifications are a plus
* Fluent in English and Italian (min. C1 Level)
**Contact:**
------------


You want to be part of the Exyte team? We look forward to receiving your application!
  

For further questions and information, please do not hesitate to contact Ilayda Öztürk via E\-Mail at ilayda.oeztuerk@exyte.net.

  

Please note that we only consider applications submitted through our application portal. Applications sent via email will not be considered due to data protection regulations.

title: Marketing Communications Intern
description:
**Work Schedule**


Standard (Mon\-Fri)**Environmental Conditions**


Office**Job Description**


As part of the Thermo Fisher Scientific team, you’ll discover meaningful work that makes a positive impact on a global scale. Join our colleagues in bringing our Mission to life every single day to enable our customers to make the world healthier, cleaner and safer. We provide our global teams with the resources needed to achieve individual career goals while helping to take science a step beyond by developing solutions for some of the world’s toughest challenges, like protecting the environment, making sure our food is safe or helping find cures for cancer.  

  

DESCRIPTION:  

Join Thermo Fisher Scientific as an Intern II and be part of our mission to enable customers to make the world healthier, cleaner, and safer. This internship opportunity offers practical experience working with diverse teams across various disciplines. You'll gain valuable exposure to meaningful projects while receiving professional mentorship and development opportunities to support your career growth.  

  

Our interns are matched to projects based on their abilities and current business needs. You'll collaborate with cross\-functional teams, contribute to strategic initiatives, and develop practical skills through hands\-on experience. Whether you're interested in research and development, engineering, finance, marketing, or operations, you'll have the chance to make significant contributions while building your professional network.  

  

You'll work with teams to identify process improvements, participate in continuous improvement initiatives, and gain exposure to advanced technologies and industry best practices. This internship provides a foundation for potential future opportunities within our Leadership Development Programs or full\-time positions.  

  

REQUIREMENTS:  

* Minimum 1 year of experience
* Preferred Fields of Study: Academic program that aligns with internship focus area
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills
* Proven analytical and problem\-solving capabilities
* Ability to work both independently and collaboratively in a team environment
* Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications
* Detail\-oriented with strong organizational skills
* Demonstrated leadership potential through academic or extracurricular activities
* Professional demeanor and strong work ethic
* Ability to manage multiple priorities
* Authorization to work in country of employment without sponsorship
* Previous internship experience preferred but not required
* Ability to meet physical requirements specific to role and work environment
* Willingness to learn and apply continuous improvement methodologies
* Commitment to safety, quality and regulatory compliance standards
* Foreign language skills may be required for some international positions
